div.h1: CFS Bandwidth Controller: CPU Throttling Mechanics

g.text: Quota reset to 50ms at period boundary

div.p: Effective CPU % Calculation Percentage = (quota / period) * 100 Ex: 50000 / 100000 = 50.0%
Measuring Impact If throttled_usec is increasing, container is being limited by quota.
Only affects scheduling priority. NO hard limit enforced. If idle: can use 100% CPU.
Hard limit: 50% CPU cap. Throttling when exceeded. Never exceeds limit.

text.tspan: // Will be refilled at next period start
// Will be refilled at next period start
